message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
participant "executor:AnalysisExecutor" as executor
participant ":Analysis" as analysis
participant ":CountryCaseAPIGetter" as caseAPI
participant ":CountryDeathAPIGetter" as deathAPI
participant ":CountryPopulationAPIGetter" as popAPI
participant ":APIInformationGetter" as infoAPI
actor "Covid API" as covidAPI

User -> executor: runAnalysis()
activate executor
executor -> analysis: analyze()
activate analysis

opt At least one country selected for analysis
    alt CasesPerCapitaAnalysis
        par
            analysis -> caseAPI: getCases()
            activate caseAPI
            caseAPI -> caseAPI: getDataURL()
            caseAPI -> caseAPI: API Endpoint URL
            caseAPI -> covidAPI: API Call
            activate covidAPI
            covidAPI --> caseAPI: API Information
            deactivate covidAPI
            caseAPI --> analysis: Cases in target Countries
            deactivate caseAPI
            
            analysis -> popAPI: getPopulation()
            activate popAPI
            popAPI -> popAPI: getDataURL()
            popAPI -> popAPI: API Endpoint URL
            popAPI -> covidAPI: API Call
            activate covidAPI
            covidAPI --> popAPI: API Information
            deactivate covidAPI
            popAPI --> analysis: Population of target Countries
            deactivate popAPI
        end
    else TotalCaseAnalysis
        analysis -> caseAPI: getCases()
        activate caseAPI
        caseAPI -> caseAPI: getDataURL()
        caseAPI -> caseAPI: API Endpoint URL
        caseAPI -> covidAPI: API Call
        activate covidAPI
        covidAPI --> caseAPI: API Information
        deactivate covidAPI
        caseAPI --> analysis: Cases in target Countries
        deactivate caseAPI
    else MajorityCasesSexPerCapitaAnalysis
        par
            analysis -> caseAPI: getMaleCases()
            activate caseAPI
            caseAPI -> caseAPI: getDataURL()
            caseAPI -> caseAPI: API Endpoint URL
            caseAPI -> covidAPI: API Call
            activate covidAPI
            covidAPI --> caseAPI: API Information
            deactivate covidAPI
            caseAPI --> analysis: Male cases in target Countries
            deactivate caseAPI
            
            analysis -> caseAPI: getFemaleCases()
            note right: A call to the endpoint has\nalready been made so\nanother is not necessary
            caseAPI --> analysis: Female cases in target Countries
            
            analysis -> popAPI: getMalePopulation()
            activate popAPI
            popAPI -> popAPI: getDataURL()
            popAPI -> popAPI: API Endpoint URL
            popAPI -> covidAPI: API Call
            activate covidAPI
            covidAPI --> popAPI: API Information
            deactivate covidAPI
            popAPI --> analysis: Male population in target Countries
            deactivate popAPI
            
            analysis -> popAPI: getFemalePopulation()
            note right: A call to the endpoint has\nalready been made so\nanother is not necessary
            popAPI --> analysis: Female population in target Countries
        end
    else DeathsPerCapitaAnalysis
        par
            analysis -> deathAPI: getDeaths()
            activate deathAPI
            deathAPI -> deathAPI: getDataURL()
            deathAPI -> deathAPI: API Endpoint URL
            deathAPI -> covidAPI: API Call
            activate covidAPI
            covidAPI --> deathAPI: API Information
            deactivate covidAPI
            deathAPI --> analysis: Deaths in target Countries
            deactivate deathAPI
            
            analysis -> popAPI: getPopulation()
            activate popAPI
            popAPI -> popAPI: getDataURL()
            popAPI -> popAPI: API Endpoint URL
            popAPI -> covidAPI: API Call
            activate covidAPI
            covidAPI --> popAPI: API Information
            deactivate covidAPI
            popAPI --> analysis: Population of target Countries
            deactivate popAPI
        end
    end
end

analysis --> executor: Analysis Result
deactivate analysis
executor --> User: Finish (void)
deactivate executor

note right of User: Per country analysis results\nare stored for later rendering
@enduml
```
